---
title: "UIAO Management Stack"
version: "1.0"
classification: "Public"
---

# UIAO Management Stack

**Version 1.0**

---

## 1. Overview

The UIAO Management Stack defines the FedRAMP-authorized platforms that provide incident lifecycle management, endpoint configuration enforcement, and continuous authorization support. These platforms operate alongside the core UIAO vendor stack (Cisco, Infoblox, Microsoft Identity) to deliver a complete operational management capability.

The following diagram shows how the management stack integrates with the broader UIAO architecture through the telemetry and identity planes.

![UIAO Management Stack Integration](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPHBRjim48RtEiKWtRGB8mtI0aKMHMWz0g6GB5WgWW3TqDJ484oHnf1sa0lq03rYJr9AVaXfKodQylldyGsWM-iukLsZ0hkHUik9Dx3YOhCcizDrQ9GXU9Tqtu2eyP7lb4kCTZbl41X9Fgp0YCpJCNmrlsQVmy7Zt52DzBzNGk6uNYiSnxP-HhwUWBHn4mGJJkwbUnwdGjDiZKRjtZXwwsLYy37aDDGeqneU0tgFVryp_f9yJE9NNFu3pfDFByv-jZLPiZSsYKRSyHMtRvYpFf6lNE6yBboKI7ifC3TFa5Pb1fTmjmmlW5ieyyNzaCoa86FDeuDKkvt67_fzhEkjaTf15cKVkb2QLz_pU1WBdrT8Z3PGiCn72l9I5Awnze84Mdl8XG_pUCcMtuR9jFPAl40e53-sSyGXZOwjYY5SeS867VLqsQOrAhzIU1glUf5Px94KxnEXjC906StkMNxW5qNGQe3PxAlFmerVNSXsBAYasA2pmM7X3aXR8C9MPtTI9RaM69nMwvc1Wz8Ra4RRm5TltxjkDy0KahFm--Ullj41E5VpPT8CxepVGNTz5aK_PgByFSzAWblKjVzh_G40)

---



---



---

## 4. Vendor Logic Processing

The following diagram illustrates how the UIAO data layer processes management stack configurations through the Jinja2 rendering pipeline to produce vendor-specific outputs.

![Management Stack: Vendor Logic Processing](https://www.plantuml.com/plantuml/png/ZPHFJy904CNlV8eDNlI0KTJ4aw4jD06b4a09YPUX7UfAEqkc2uHlxxOKAFvfwMcRVR_PDs-osqeqi5x5KIrPI5e2Goncu2z2LYiA71Kf5XTkzXKK0SvX5MbNaVOWHc6nX685YrbjSlZMlhCUdCAchJX0_c-NqTT0OOJbigNn2665Y9IkK5Y-bckfj-KgHyLBHKZwJEjfBXN6ooHxKwMQDE4omJ77dzFiFBetRkUFB7y9RVV-PEo7j2fB7XEhbBP1mmoICtm6U-KVKuXmheLMWcNugKKWq_QbejgU4NK7I96OMlsN3xhi0vcEOsDGZBGvE7DnLHUGP8hQ8JrHxqdwWgOO8fb3aGqS8Y63nklbTeVqcaLWXBoMFdfgOsAWkGmDqXsF-cAYU36Fr2RPKIFlTLBakgHNX6AW8kbBJ5ANxNvUOaTqlV6RroaopdQ6RF52lAVtCMK6rYdZJEtEq1e-rzA-HAFnbBhjDRDLvY1VvxNplmFLCcsRr-4R)

---

*Generated from UIAO data layer — Management Stack v1.0*
